extracted.full_content:
Surendra Nath Reddy Eedula

Human Resources(HR)

🚀 We’re Hiring: AI/ML Engineer – AI Ops | Pan India | Hybrid
Are you passionate about building AI-driven operational systems and transforming traditional monitoring into intelligent, self-healing platforms? This opportunity is for you!
We are looking for an experienced AI/ML Engineer to drive AI Ops initiatives, including observability, anomaly detection, automation, and operational intelligence.
🔍 What You’ll Work On:
✔️ AI-powered observability & monitoring
✔️ Anomaly detection (latency, traffic, error rates, infra metrics)
✔️ Alert reduction & intelligent incident management
✔️ Self-healing & auto-remediation systems
✔️ LLM-based solutions (RAG, embeddings, vector DBs)
🛠️ Key Skills:
• Python, scikit-learn, Databricks
• NLP (Transformers, GPT) – Production experience
• LLMs (RAG, Vector DB, Embeddings)
• ML techniques (time-series, supervised/unsupervised learning)
• API development for ML models
• Cloud: Azure (preferred) / AWS / GCP
📍 Location: Pan India (Hybrid)
🕒 Experience: 5–7+ Years
🆔 Req ID: 561069
💡 Bonus: Experience in AI Ops, SRE, or GenAI (vision/speech models)
📩 Interested candidates – drop your resume or DM me!
Mail ID :eedula.surendra@clyptus.in
Contract : +91 7793913978
🔗 Feel free to tag or share with your network
#Hiring #AIML #AIOps #MachineLearning #GenAI #LLM #NLP #DataScience #Azure #Careers #TechJobs
